items.title: GP Partnership Appeal Slumps, Survey Finds
items.description: Most GPs back the partnership model, but fewer than a third say they are likely to take on the role, RCGP survey data show. Medscape News UK

items.title: Tirzepatide Now Available in Multi-Dose KwikPen
items.description: Patients who pay cash can get the multi-dose KwikPen device on LillyDirect, with prices starting at $299 for the lowest dose. Medscape Medical News
